name: code-switch
description: Code-switched Voice Turn — the key acceptance criterion: 'rate-limit' must appear verbatim in the request content.

input.intent: add per-IP rate-limiting with sliding window
input.raw: 这个 function should rate-limit 每个 IP，max 10次 per second，用 sliding window 算法，然后如果超了就返回 429。
